title: viguiera grandiflora f. latifolia
intro: Viguiera grandiflora f. latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved Viguiera or broad-leaved tree marigold, is a plant species in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Viguiera grandiflora f. latifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
